page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 16 dedicated physical cores with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, providing 16 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is bundled with a 959 GB SSD, and the instance operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear performance profile. Single-core processing is a notable tradeoff, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance and single-threaded gzip compression both scoring in the weak bottom 25% tier. However, multi-core capabilities are more robust, with stress-ng multi-core, passmark CPU, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression all registering in the average middle 50% range. Memory bandwidth for both small and large blocks, along with write operations, also performs within the average tier.

Given the balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and the bundled 959 GB SSD, this server is positioned for general-purpose workloads and database operations. It achieves average performance in Redis SET operations, static web serving throughput, and database operations. The dedicated CPU allocation offers consistent resource density, though the weak single-core performance suggests it is less suited for single-threaded compute-heavy tasks. It is appropriate for web serving, database hosting, and moderate multi-threaded processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.4xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server featuring 16 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, a bundled 959 GB local SSD, and a 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks indicate a distinct tradeoff: single-core CPU execution and single-threaded gzip compression fall into the bottom 25% tier, whereas multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations consistently rank in the average middle 50% tier. With its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is suitable for database hosting, static web serving, and multi-threaded processing workloads that benefit from local SSD storage but do not require high single-threaded compute speeds.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.4xlarge is an x86_64 server with 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 959 GB local SSD, delivering average multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i3g.4xlarge features 16 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 959 GB local SSD for general-purpose and database workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 16-core x86_64 server with 64 GB RAM and bundled local SSD storage for balanced multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel Xeon physical cores running at 2.5 GHz
64.0 GB system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Bundled 959 GB local SSD storage for low-latency data access
Average multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and database benchmark performance
Weak single-core performance and single-threaded compression tradeoffs
Suitable for database hosting, static web serving, and general-purpose workloads
